chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6794 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on CMA No.29358/2021 (Stay). 3. For hearing of Main Case. 23.11.2021 Mr. Sardar Muhammad Ishaque, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that valuation ruling in respect of the goods is under challenged before the Director Valuation and hence petitioner seeks release of the consignment subject to payment of differential amount with the Nazir of this Court and payment of duties and taxes with the customs officials. Accordingly, since there is no question of importability, let the goods be released subject to securing the differential amount with reference to the litigation with the Nazir of this Court and payment of duties and taxes with the customs officials. It is expected that the Director Valuation would decide the issue relating to valuation ruling expeditiously. Fate of the security shall be subject to the outcome of the decision of the Director Valuation. Petition stands disposed of along with listed application(s) in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
